creator: zerium@webindex.no
text:
Kmpg is an MPEG audio player for the KDE project. The player uses mpg123 by
Michael Hipp as a decoding engine (note: do not contact him about bugs/
features in kmpg, rather contact Martin Muller).

Kmpg has the following advanced features:
* Supports MPEG 1.0/2.0, layers 1,2 and 3.
* Simple to use interface.
* Drag and drop support using the KDE dnd standard.
* Support for multiple platforms: Linux, FreeBSD, Solaris 2.x, SunOS 4.x
  (tested 4.1.4), HP/UX 7xx, SGI IRIX, DEC Unix (tested 3.2 and 4.0), OSF/1,
  DEC Ultrix (tested 4.4) and IBM AIX (tested 4.1).
* Playlist editor.
* Advanced configuration dialog allowing the user to tune the behaviour of
  the decoder.
* All configuration changes can be applied while playing a stream.

Fix:

#
#	kmpg
#	kmpg/files
#	kmpg/files/md5
#	kmpg/pkg
#	kmpg/pkg/COMMENT

#	kmpg/Makefile
#	kmpg/patches

#	kmpg/patches/patch-af
#	kmpg/patches/patch-ag
#	kmpg/patches/patch-ah

echo c - kmpg
mkdir -p kmpg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - kmpg/files
mkdir -p kmpg/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - kmpg/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >kmpg/files/md5 << 'END-of-kmpg/files/md5'
XMD5 (kmpg-0.3.3.tgz) = dbfd6987d506331f410fd5df62a6b3f5
END-of-kmpg/files/md5
echo c - kmpg/pkg
mkdir -p kmpg/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - kmpg/pkg/COMMENT
sed 's/^X//' >kmpg/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-kmpg/pkg/COMMENT'
XKDE Mpeg1/2 audio stream player, handles layer I, II, and III streams
END-of-kmpg/pkg/COMMENT
echo x - kmpg/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >kmpg/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-kmpg/pkg/DESCR'
XKmpg is an MPEG audio player for the KDE project. The player uses mpg123 by
XMichael Hipp as a decoding engine (note: do not contact him about bugs/
Xfeatures in kmpg, rather contact Martin Muller).
X
XKmpg has the following advanced features:
X* Supports MPEG 1.0/2.0, layers 1,2 and 3.
X* Simple to use interface.
X* Drag and drop support using the KDE dnd standard.
X* Support for multiple platforms: Linux, FreeBSD, Solaris 2.x, SunOS 4.x
X  (tested 4.1.4), HP/UX 7xx, SGI IRIX, DEC Unix (tested 3.2 and 4.0), OSF/1,
X  DEC Ultrix (tested 4.4) and IBM AIX (tested 4.1).
X* Playlist editor.
X* Advanced configuration dialog allowing the user to tune the behaviour of
X  the decoder.
X* All configuration changes can be applied while playing a stream.
END-of-kmpg/pkg/DESCR

sed 's/^X//' >kmpg/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-kmpg/pkg/PLIST'

echo x - kmpg/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >kmpg/Makefile << 'END-of-kmpg/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:   kmpg
X# Version required:    Beta4
X# Date created:        23 May 1998
X# Whom:                Hans Petter Bieker <hanspb@persbraten.vgs.no>
X#
X# $Id$
X#
X
XDISTNAME=	kmpg-0.3.3
XCATEGORIES=	audio x11 kde
XMASTER_SITES=	$(MASTER_SITE_KDE)
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR= /unstable/apps/multimedia/sound
XEXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
X
XMAINTAINER=	hanspb@persbraten.vgs.no
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	moc:${PORTSDIR}/x11/qt
XLIB_DEPENDS=	qt\\.1\\.3[1-9]:${PORTSDIR}/x11/qt \
X		kdecore\\.0\\.9[0-9]:${PORTSDIR}/x11/kdelibs \
X		kdeui\\.0\\.9[1-9]:${PORTSDIR}/x11/kdelibs
X
XUSE_GMAKE=	yes
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-kmpg/Makefile
echo c - kmpg/patches
mkdir -p kmpg/patches > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - kmpg/patches/patch-aa
sed 's/^X//' >kmpg/patches/patch-aa << 'END-of-kmpg/patches/patch-aa'
X--- Makefile.orig	Wed May  6 23:35:22 1998
X+++ Makefile	Sat May 23 17:02:25 1998
X@@ -1,18 +1,18 @@
X ####### Kmpg Makefile
X 
X-INCDIR	=	-I$(QTDIR)/include -I$(KDEDIR)/include
X+INCDIR	=	-I$(X11BASE)/include/X11/qt -I$(X11BASE)/include -I$(LOCALBASE)/include
X CFLAGS	=	-O6
X-LFLAGS	=	-L$(QTDIR)/lib -lqt -L/usr/X11R6/lib -L$(KDEDIR)/lib -lXext -lX11 -lkdecore -lkdeui -lm -lg++
X+LFLAGS	=	-L$(X11BASE)/lib -L$(LOCALBASE)/lib -lqt -lXext -lX11 -lkdecore -lkdeui -lm -lg++ -lcompat
X CC	=	g++
X-MOC	=	$(QTDIR)/bin/moc
X+MOC	=	$(X11BASE)/bin/moc
X 
X ############# Install ##############
X 
X-INSTALL = install -m 0755 -s
X-INSTALL_SHELL = install -m 0755
X-INSTALL_DATA = install -m 0644
X-INSTALL_DIR = install -d -m 0755
X-INSTALL_DIR_PRIVATE = install -d -m 0700
X+INSTALL = install -c -m 0555 -s -o bin -g bin
X+INSTALL_SHELL = install -c -m 0555 -o bin -g bin
X+INSTALL_DATA = install -c -m 0444 -o bin -g bin
X+INSTALL_DIR = install -c -d -m 0755 -o root -g wheel
X+INSTALL_DIR_PRIVATE = install -c -d -m 0700 -o root -g wheel
X 
X prefix = $(KDEDIR)
X BINDIR = $(prefix)/bin
X@@ -52,7 +52,7 @@
X 	$(CC) $(OBJECTS) $(OBJMETA) -o $(TARGET) $(LFLAGS)
X 
X library: 
X-	cd lib; make linux; cd ..
X+	cd lib; make freebsd; cd ..
X 
X depend:
X 	@makedepend $(INCDIR) $(SOURCES) 2> /dev/null
END-of-kmpg/patches/patch-aa
echo x - kmpg/patches/patch-ab
sed 's/^X//' >kmpg/patches/patch-ab << 'END-of-kmpg/patches/patch-ab'
X--- lib/mpg123.c.orig	Thu May 14 18:26:41 1998
X+++ lib/mpg123.c	Thu May 14 18:27:28 1998
X@@ -1176,7 +1176,7 @@
X /*       return 1; */
X    }
X 
X-   while (frameNum < frame) // seek forward
X+   while (frameNum < frame) /* seek forward */
X    {
X       if(fr.lay == 3)
X 	 set_pointer(512);
X@@ -1263,8 +1263,8 @@
X       
X       MPEGclose();
X       usebuffer = _prefs->buffersize;
X-      MPEGplayfile(name); // this calls MPEGinit();
X-      MPEGseek( pos );// find old frame and keep on playing
X+      MPEGplayfile(name); /* this calls MPEGinit(); */
X+      MPEGseek( pos );/* find old frame and keep on playing */
X    }
X }
X 
END-of-kmpg/patches/patch-ab
echo x - kmpg/patches/patch-ac
sed 's/^X//' >kmpg/patches/patch-ac << 'END-of-kmpg/patches/patch-ac'
X--- lib/Makefile.orig	Thu May 14 18:29:32 1998
X+++ lib/Makefile	Thu May 14 18:29:48 1998
X@@ -208,7 +208,7 @@
X mpg123.a: player.o mpg123_2.o common.o $(OBJECTS) decode_2to1.o decode_4to1.o \
X 		tabinit.o audio.o layer1.o layer2.o layer3.o buffer.o \
X 		getlopt.o httpget.o xfermem.o equalizer.o Makefile
X-	ar -rs mpg123.a player.o mpg123_2.o tabinit.o common.o layer1.o \
X+	ar -r mpg123.a player.o mpg123_2.o tabinit.o common.o layer1.o \
X 		layer2.o layer3.o audio.o buffer.o decode_2to1.o equalizer.o \
X 		decode_4to1.o getlopt.o httpget.o xfermem.o $(OBJECTS)
X 
END-of-kmpg/patches/patch-ac
echo x - kmpg/patches/patch-af
sed 's/^X//' >kmpg/patches/patch-af << 'END-of-kmpg/patches/patch-af'
X--- khelp.h.orig	Thu May 14 19:18:49 1998
X+++ khelp.h	Thu May 14 19:19:35 1998
X@@ -11,7 +11,9 @@

X #include <sys/ipc.h>
X #include <sys/msg.h>
X+#include <sys/msgbuf.h>
X 
X+long mtype;
X 
X class KHelpMsg : protected msgbuf
X {
END-of-kmpg/patches/patch-af
echo x - kmpg/patches/patch-ag
sed 's/^X//' >kmpg/patches/patch-ag << 'END-of-kmpg/patches/patch-ag'
X--- kmpg.h.orig	Thu May 14 19:20:37 1998
X+++ kmpg.h	Thu May 14 19:20:55 1998
X@@ -24,10 +24,10 @@
X #include <signal.h>
X #include <sys/utsname.h>
X #include <unistd.h>
X-#if defined(_FreeBSD__) || defined(__NetBSD__)
X+#if defined(__FreeBSD__) || defined(__NetBSD__)
X #else
X #include <mntent.h>
X-#include <sys/soundcard.h>
X+#include <machine/soundcard.h>
X #endif
X #include <sys/types.h>
X #include <sys/stat.h>
END-of-kmpg/patches/patch-ag
echo x - kmpg/patches/patch-ah
sed 's/^X//' >kmpg/patches/patch-ah << 'END-of-kmpg/patches/patch-ah'
X--- playlist.h.orig	Thu May 14 19:22:14 1998
X+++ playlist.h	Thu May 14 19:22:24 1998
X@@ -10,10 +10,10 @@
X #include <signal.h>
X #include <sys/utsname.h>
X #include <unistd.h>
X-#if defined(_FreeBSD__) || defined(__NetBSD__)
X+#if defined(__FreeBSD__) || defined(__NetBSD__)
X #else
X #include <mntent.h>
X-#include <sys/soundcard.h>
X+#include <machine/soundcard.h>
X #endif
X #include <sys/types.h>
X #include <sys/stat.h>
END-of-kmpg/patches/patch-ah
exit
